description: Canonical raw/ source-artifact bucket taxonomy. scripts/lint.py reads this file to validate that every raw/ subfolder is a known bucket. This tracked file is the source of truth for the taxonomy because raw/ artifacts are gitignored.
policy: raw/ holds source artifacts. Existing raw files are immutable, and source artifacts stay local unless a user explicitly chooses to version an example. A pre-commit hook (scripts/hooks/pre-commit) and a lint Tier-1 check block committed raw artifacts while allowing raw/.gitkeep and raw/README.md.

buckets.customer-research: Customer interview notes, support findings, and user research
buckets.ai-research: Example AI research and workflow sources, if present in this checkout
buckets.social: Example social or screenshot captures, if present in this checkout
buckets.videos: Example video transcript captures, if present in this checkout
